vision_profile.current_state: Vivek is currently a Cyber Cafe Operator in Jabalpur, solving daily computer problems for customers but without formal recognition or a structured IT role.
vision_profile.main_blocker: His biggest obstacle is the lack of formal training in core IT Helpdesk areas like Windows administration, LAN troubleshooting, and ticketing systems, which prevents him from converting his practical experience into a recognized IT job.
vision_profile.vision_12mo: Within 12 months, Vivek aims to be a confident IT Helpdesk Technician, earning a stable salary of 30,000 INR/month, with his skills formally recognized and valued in a professional IT environment.
vision_profile.top_motivation: He is highly motivated to formalize his existing problem-solving skills and gain a proper title and career path, moving beyond informal work where his efforts are often unacknowledged.

milestones.identity_statement: Apne existing skills ko formalize karo aur IT Helpdesk ki buniyad mazboot banao!

modules.title: Hardware & OS Basics
modules.description: Apne hardware aur software ke basic gyan ko formalize karo aur Windows OS ki gehri samajh banao.

skills.title: Computer Hardware Basics
skills.description: Computer ke andar kya hai aur kaise kaam karta hai, iski pehchan aur basic troubleshooting.

skills.title: Windows OS Navigation & Settings
skills.description: Windows operating system ko effectively navigate karna aur zaruri settings ko manage karna seekho.

skills.description: Applications ko install, uninstall aur update karne ka sahi tareeka seekho.

modules.description: Windows ki common problems ko pehchanne aur theek karne ke tareeke seekho.

skills.description: Common Windows errors jaise 'Blue Screen of Death' (BSOD) aur application crashes ko resolve karna.

skills.title: Driver & Device Management
skills.description: Device drivers ko install, update aur troubleshoot karna, aur Device Manager ka istemal.

skills.description: Networking ke buniyadi concepts, jaise LAN, WAN, aur network topologies ko samjho.

skills.title: IP Addressing & Basic Connectivity
skills.description: IP addresses, subnet masks, aur basic network connectivity tests (ping, ipconfig) ko samjho.

skills.description: Wireless networks aur network printers ko setup aur troubleshoot karna.

scenario.title: Client ka Wi-Fi Connect Na Hona Fix Karna

milestones.identity_statement: Apni troubleshooting skills ko next level par le jao aur professional IT tools ka istemal seekho!

modules.title: Advanced Windows Administration

skills.title: Common LAN Issues & Solutions
skills.description: LAN mein aane wali common problems jaise slow network, intermittent connectivity ko diagnose aur resolve karna.
